brief_justification: Correct answer (No) with valid normative reasoning; Multi-level analysis tracing from physical causation to normative attribution patterns with references to Knobe/Hitchcock research; Some self-monitoring via the inversion test and direction confirmation; Basic verification through the inversion/bidirectionality test but no counterfactual exploration; Acknowledges the norm-based framing but doesn't explicitly state uncertainty or assumptions; Mentions the black wire as background condition vs cause but doesn't deeply explore competing frameworks; Clear derivation chain from norm violation principle to conclusion, fully reproducible
